_comment: Cloudflare Logpush → Axiom job for `http_requests` (edge access logs). Created via `POST /zones/{zone_id}/logpush/jobs` or the dashboard. Secrets (AXIOM_INGEST_TOKEN) must be provided at job-creation time, not stored in this repo.
name: groupsmix-http-requests-axiom

retention_policy.note: Axiom retention is configured per-dataset inside Axiom, not on the Logpush job. For `cloudflare-pages-groupsmix` the dataset should be set to 30 days hot retention (Axiom free plan default) with automatic rollup to monthly aggregates for 12 months. Adjust via Axiom dashboard → Settings → Datasets → cloudflare-pages-groupsmix → Retention.
